Headline: Howard-bound Red Line? trains bypassing Grand Station
ShortDescription: Howard-bound Red Line? trains are running, and are still not stopping at Grand due to a police investigation.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Howard-bound Red Line trains are running, and are still not stopping at Grand due to a police investigation.

  • 95th-bound Red Line trains are not affected.

Also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines. These may include: #65 Grand buses. 

We apologize for this inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
